questions.question:
Study the following table carefully and answer the questions given below it:

\[ \begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|} \hline \text{Years} & {\text{Toys}}& {\text{Toys}}& {\text{Toys}} & {\text{Toys}} & {\text{Toys}} \\ \hline & \text{A} & \text{B} & \text{C} & \text{D} & \text{E} \\ \hline 1982 & 200 & 150 & 78 & 90 & 65 \\ \hline 1983 & 150 & 180 & 100 & 105 & 70 \\ \hline 1984 & 180 & 175 & 92 & 110 & 85 \\ \hline 1985 & 195 & 160 & 120 & 125 & 75 \\ \hline 1986 & 220 & 185 & 130 & 135 & 80 \\ \hline \end{array} \]


What was the percentage (approximate) increase in production of D type of toys from \( 1983 \) to \( 1985 \)?



ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 84
